records.stderr_pattern: unauthorized: authentication required|no basic auth credentials
records.description: Docker registry authentication required — ensure DOCKER_CONFIG points to valid credentials

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Error response from daemon: Head https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/mycompany/backend/manifests/latest: unauthorized: authentication required" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: DENIED: access to the requested resource|denied: denied
records.description: Docker registry access denied, possibly expired token — reset config and retry

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "DENIED: access to the requested resource is not authorized" >&2; exit 1'
